column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Hardee, Hillsborough, Manatee, Polk until Aug 05 5:45AM. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest weather information.

So...whenever there is a tornado warning...what are we supposed to do?
Stay still? Will an alarm sound? How do we know if there's one near by?

I get alerts on my phone. Find your county weather alert system. Warning, go to an interior room. I have a bathroom designated for this. Water, food and a battery operated radio/flashlight thing stored in there....tornados go fast but if I get trapped in there, I'm prepared
warning means, rotation indicated on the radar, take cover, it could touch down anywhere until the time indicated
thanks 🙏
